OpenHardwareMonitor_x64.exe in this package comes from:
https://github.com/HardwareMonitor/openhardwaremonitor/releases

Upstream repository:
https://github.com/HardwareMonitor/openhardwaremonitor

winmon does not modify this executable.

Upstream README notes:
- some sensors may require administrator privileges
- antivirus false positives are possible on some systems

See GPL-3.0.txt in the same directory for the bundled license text.
